title: Extension.dev Publish / Distribution Manifest
description: The descriptor for a published build: what artifacts exist, their signing/installability per browser engine, and where the shareable URL serves them. THE CROSS-REPO SEAM: produced by extension.js (`extension publish`), consumed by the extension.dev platform (hosts the artifacts at <workspaceSlug>.extension.dev/<projectSlug>/<sha7>/<browser>.<ext>), wrapped by @extension.dev/mcp (`extension_publish`, auth-gated). Called the 'publish descriptor' in prose to avoid confusion with the extension's own manifest.json. Note: `extension build` emits unsigned per-browser ZIPs (plugin-compilation/zip.ts); signing (Firefox .xpi via AMO, store submission) is a later platform step that UPGRADES this descriptor in place.

v.description: Schema version. Bump via $id + this field together.

source.description: Provenance — pins the build to a CLI + project (mirrors docs/readiness meta).

cliVersion.description: Resolved `extension` package version that built the artifacts.

artifacts.description: One entry per built browser target.

distribution.description: Where the artifacts are reachable. Hosted by the extension.dev platform.

url.description: The shareable base URL for this build. Pattern (confirmed in www.extension.dev): https://<workspaceSlug>.extension.dev/<projectSlug>/<sha7>, where <sha7> is the 7-char short build SHA (the canonical build identity — no separate deployment id). Each browser artifact is a file under this base, named <browser>.<ext> (see artifact.downloadUrl).

visibility.description: unlisted = link-only (not indexed). private = requires an extension.dev session.

file.description: Filename as served, e.g. my-extension-1.0.0.zip or my-extension-1.0.0.xpi.

ext.description: Default from `extension build` is .zip for every engine (unsigned). .xpi appears only after AMO signing; .crx only after CWS keypair signing.

sha256.description: Integrity digest the platform serves + the descriptor pins (mirrors templates-meta.json integrity).

downloadUrl.description: Canonical per-browser artifact URL = distribution.url + /<browser>.<ext>, e.g. https://<workspaceSlug>.extension.dev/<projectSlug>/<sha7>/chrome.zip or .../firefox.xpi. This is the file a user downloads for this engine.

signing.description: Signing state. This — not the extension — decides whether a normal user can install from the URL.

state.description: unsigned = raw build zip (what `extension build` emits). store-signed = signed by the store authority (AMO for Firefox; CWS for Chrome). There is no meaningful self-signed tier for modern engines.

submissionId.description: Store/AMO submission id when signing went through @extension.dev/deploy.

installability.description: The HONEST install class for this artifact: chromium-unpacked = zip, load-unpacked, dev/tester only. chromium-store-only = normal users must install from the Web Store (off-store .crx is blocked). firefox-temporary = unsigned, loads only via about:debugging / Developer Edition. firefox-signed = AMO-signed .xpi, installable directly from the URL (TRUE self-distribution). store-listed = the URL points at a published store listing. safari-convert-required = needs Xcode conversion (see safari build target).

install.description: Rendered guidance for this artifact's install class.

summary.description: One-line, e.g. 'Installable directly in Firefox' or 'Load unpacked (developers/testers only)'.
